headline: 'Can We Do That?' Intercontinental Exchange CEO Reveals Interest In Launching Perpetual Futures Amid Hyperliquid Success
summary: New York Stock Exchange parent company Intercontinental Exchange Inc. (NYSE:ICE) has been talking with regulators about launching perpetual futures amid decentralized exchange Hyperliquid’s success, according to CEO Jeffery Sprecher. "What we are saying to the regulators is, ‘Can we do...
